title: Myeloma Machine Representation Stack v0

sources.label: Comprehensive Molecular Profiling Of Multiple Myeloma Identifies Refined Copy Number And Expression Subtypes
A Single-Cell Atlas Characterizes Dysregulation Of The Bone Marrow Immune Microenvironment Associated With Outcomes In Multiple Myeloma
Genomic Landscape Of Multiple Myeloma And Its Precursor Conditions

limitations: Not a claim of validated clinical utility.

Does not contain patient-identifying data, real case data, raw sequencing records, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, portal exports, images, notes, exact dates tied to a person, private paths, private case IDs, or re-identification keys.
Does not collect, normalize, store, transmit, train on, infer from, predict for, publish, compare, rank, or authorize use of real patient data.
Does not output patient-specific diagnosis, prognosis, treatment recommendations, trial recommendations, resistance calls, monitoring guidance, candidate option ranking, or clinical decisions.
All biological claims require source-specific extraction and expert validation before stronger downstream use.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
